use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF BACTERIAL INFECTIONS USING A TWO-DOSE REGIMEN OF DALBAVANCIN.
TREATMENT OF ACUTE BACTERIAL SKIN AND SKIN STRUCTURE INFECTIONS (ABSSSI) IN ADULT AND PEDIATRIC PATIENTS USING A TWO-DOSE REGIMEN OF DALBAVANCIN
